title: MRN CO-001 Post-Tension Redesign Level 8-12
description: Structural engineer required redesign of PT slab system at residential levels 8-12 due to increased condo unit layout loads from owner unit mix change. Affects 5 floors of PT design and pour sequence.

title: MRN CO-002 Unitized Curtain Wall Wind Load Upgrade
description: Chicago Building Dept required wind load increase per updated ASCE 7-22 criteria for high-rise zone. Curtain wall system upgraded from base spec to enhanced wind-rated system.

title: MRN CO-003 Lobby Feature Ceiling Canopy
description: Owner requested installation of custom architectural steel canopy in main retail lobby replacing standard ACT ceiling. Includes specialty steel fabrication and lighting integration.

title: MRN CO-004 EV Charging Infrastructure - Garage
description: Chicago EV ordinance requires 20% of parking spaces EV-ready. Added 60 Level 2 EV outlets and conduit for future 40 additional spaces.

title: MRN CO-005 Residential Unit Upgrade - Smart Home Package
description: Developer marketing decision to upgrade all 210 residential units with Lutron smart home automation Sonos audio and Nest thermostats per updated sales program.

title: SDM CO-001 Isolation Room Upgrade ICU Floor
description: Infection control specialist required upgrade of 12 ICU rooms from standard to negative pressure isolation per updated CDC guidance post-design. Includes exhaust fans monitoring and alarms.

title: SDM CO-002 OR Table Power and Data Upgrade
description: Biomedical engineering spec updated all 4 OR suites to latest table power data and boom configurations. Requires revised electrical layout and ceiling boom connections.

title: SDM CO-003 ICRA Upgrade - Additional Anterooms
description: ICRA infection control assessment required additional anterooms at 3 construction access points adjacent to occupied patient areas per APIC standards.

title: SDM CO-004 Medical Gas Expansion - MOB
description: Owner decided to add piped medical oxygen and vacuum to all 40 MOB exam rooms (originally spec'd for 12 rooms only). Requires added piping riser and outlets.

title: MSL CO-001 Additional Dock Levelers x12
description: Tenant (e-commerce retailer) increased dock door requirement from 228 to 240 during lease finalization. Added 12 dock levelers dock bumpers and seals.

title: MSL CO-002 Office Tenant Improvement Upgrade
description: Tenant upgraded 12000 SF office from base spec to Class B finish with open office casework breakroom millwork and upgraded HVAC zone control.

title: MSL CO-003 Stormwater Pond Enlargement
description: TDEC required stormwater retention pond expansion from 2.4 acre-feet to 3.8 acre-feet due to revised drainage area calculations after adjacent parcel development.

title: DSR CO-001 Geothermal Field Expansion
description: Geothermal loop field expanded from 48 to 64 bores after updated HVAC loads from pool dehumidification equipment increase. Includes additional bore drilling and piping.

title: DSR CO-002 50-Meter Pool Timing System Upgrade
description: Parks & Rec requested upgrade from base timing to USA Swimming certified electronic timing system with scoreboard display for competition hosting capability.

title: DSR CO-003 Colorado Prevailing Wage Rate Adjustment
description: Colorado Little Davis-Bacon wage determination updated mid-project. Applicable labor rate increases across all self-perform and subcontract scopes per CDLE.
